message:
feat(lexer/parser): add semicolon statement separator support

- Add Semicolon token type
- Handle semicolons as statement terminators (like newlines)
- Support multiple statements on one line: x = 1; y = 2

files.patch:
@@ -94,6 +94,7 @@ pub const TokenType = enum {
     RBrace,
     Comma,
     Colon,
+    Semicolon,
     Dot,
     Arrow,
     At,
